component.name: DeathPush
component.summary: A standalone desktop Git client with the VS Code Source Control UX

description.p: DeathPush is a standalone desktop Git client that replicates the VS Code Source Control UX. Beautiful diffs powered by Monaco Editor, clean staging, branch management, integrated terminal, and zero bloat. Built with Tauri and Rust for native performance.

ul.li: VS Code Source Control UX -- familiar staging workflow with inline diff toggles, file-level staging, and chunk-level control
Monaco-powered diffs -- full Monaco editor for diffs with syntax highlighting, inline editing, and side-by-side or unified views
Branch management -- create, switch, merge, rebase, rename, and delete branches with full remote tracking
Image diffs -- visual comparison for image changes with side-by-side, overlay, and difference modes
Git blame and file history -- line-by-line blame annotations with full file history timeline
Integrated terminal -- built-in terminal with PTY support for running git commands and scripts
Stash, tags, and cherry-pick -- full stash management, tag creation, and cherry-pick support
Multi-window -- open multiple repositories in separate windows, each with its own state
Theme support -- multiple built-in themes including dark, light, and high-contrast variants
Built with Rust -- Tauri + Rust backend for native performance, fast startup, and low memory usage

screenshot.caption: Main view with staged and unstaged changes and side-by-side diff
Branch management with merge and rebase support

description.p: Fix download links and improve distribution packaging.
Fix favicon, Open Graph metadata, and add SVG assets.
Initial release of DeathPush with VS Code Source Control UX, Monaco-powered diffs, branch management, integrated terminal, and more.
